chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-1369 of 2023 Muhammad Raza Versus Federation of Pakistan & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of Misc. No.6695/23 2. For hearing of main case. Dated: 21.03.2023 Sardar Muhammad Ishaq a/w Mr. Amjad Hayat for petitioner. Qazi Ayazuddin, Assistant Attorney General. -.-.- Mr. Muhammad Faheem Advocate files his Vakalatnama on behalf of respondents No.1 and 2 along with parawise comments, which are taken on record. It is submitted by learned counsel for petitioner that since appeal is pending before the Tribunal, let security be treated subject to the outcome of the decision of the Tribunal. Order accordingly. By consent petition along with pending application stands disposed of in the above terms. Judge Judge
